use_cases: Call-to-action buttons in landing pages and marketing sections
Interactive form submission triggers with visual feedback
Navigation and menu item actions with animated borders
Feature or product highlight buttons with gradient emphasis
User interaction points in dashboards and interfaces
ai_summary: A gradient-bordered button component featuring animated purple-to-cyan gradient borders that intensify on hover, dark mode support, and accessible focus states. Designed for prominent CTA placement across SaaS, fintech, and e-commerce platforms requiring eye-catching interactive elements.
